title: Before the Queen Elizabeth II Cup

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, during the lead-up to the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup, I find Sweep Tosho standing on
the track... not moving a muscle.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's being as difficult as ever. But when I
follow her gaze...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Thank you so much for running with me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Don't sweat it, Kawakami. By the way, you
really came out of nowhere on that last stretch.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, we're racing Sweep, after all! We're gonna
get blown out of the water if we don't give it our
all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And when we do...
...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...? What's wrong, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's just...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm truly, truly sorry for bumping into you that day!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Oh! ...But seriously, how many times do I have to
tell you there's nothing to apologize for?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Just make sure you don't hold anything back
when we race for real. Remember, I'm not settling
for second place.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Sweep's not beating me, and neither are you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but when you're running, be careful not to do
anything you think is risky!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
You're too nice, so if anything happened, I just
know you wouldn't be able to forgive yourself.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're rivals for real, I want us to
compete for real—and to keep on competing too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You have my word as a princess that I will do my
very best! Both in the Queen Elizabeth II Cup and
beyond!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Of course they do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
They just had racing magic cast on them by a
super special witch! If they didn't look happy,
we'd have a problem!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is Magical Girl Sweepy you're talking to here!
There's no spell I can't cast!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Listen here, Familiar. The next time I use my
racing magic, I'm gonna fill the whole world with
witches and wizards!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make it so everyone can use magic. And then they'll all be my apprentices!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ And then I'm gonna make everyone work
real hard.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I can't have the world getting lame again
when I'm not around anymore.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This world's got magic in it! We've gotta keep it
fun no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for this year's Queen Elizabeth II
Cup!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will this be a triumphant return for the queen who
dominated the Takarazuka Kinen?! I can't wait to
find out whether anyone has what it takes to take
her down!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: This is the Queen Elizabeth II Cup? When I saw it on TV when I was younger, it seemed more...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoa, now. Don't tell me you're gettin' scared, Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm only here cause you invited me, remember?
You said we should come see the ultimate race
since it's almost time for us to debut.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! Who are you calling "scared"?! I'm
getting tired of your idiocy!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: 'Scuse me?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When I saw the Queen Elizabeth II Cup on TV, it
looked more beautiful—more elegant and
graceful.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It was so beautiful, I felt like I was mesmerized.
But this atmosphere today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's so rugged and awesome, huh? I feel like
something's really about to kick off.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But you keep mumbling to yourself. Just come out
with it already, Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You like heated races like this too, don'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Welcome back to the turf.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All right. You guys know the deal, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm here to beat you. I'm going to come at
you with everything I've got.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You do realize I'm the one who's gonna win this?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome to try. But I'm going to cross that
finish line long before any of you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph. All right, let's do this.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. You're in for a good time, so just wait
right there.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But when I start running, make sure you enjoy
every second!
